whats_new.title: Oracle GoldenGate supports capture from standby from PostgreSQL 16 onwards
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate supports capture from PostgreSQL standby database from PostgreSQL version 16 and higher.

whats_new.title: Oracle GoldenGate Extract supports capture from OCI PostgreSQL
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate Extract supported for OCI PostgreSQL.
